content: We can reframe the intrinsic reward gap between ICM/RND and generalized curious agents as a direct function of how much uncompressed episodic novelty an active learning agent's memory buffer retains: ICM and RND underperform compared to holistic curious agents because they discard fine-grained novel memory traces that 2024-2025 SOTA active learning memory architectures can preserve to refine intrinsic reward signals. This leads to the testable hypothesis that adding SOTA structured active memory to ICM/RND agents will close the performance gap with general curious agents in sparse reward open-ended environments.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
